title: Floppy Disk Camera - Resource Pack for Mortuusars Exposure Mod
description: This This is a retexture and re-model of the camera in Mortuusars Exposure Mod, inspired by the mavica camera series.
body:
![Shows three images in what look to be windows from a 2000s computer opersting system one with floppy disks and a floppy disk camera the other with floppy disks withthe text "state of the art technology the last with a floppy disk camera with the text "a new modern look".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc12c85a3bcc29406346ab1a1a30a2fccd1e316.jpeg)
This is a re-model and retexture of the camera and film from **[Mortuusars Exposure Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)**. This design was inspired by the mavica floppy disk cameras from the 2000s and late 90s. I hope you enjoy!

---

_See gallery for ingame images and retextures._

---

**Original Mod Creator** - [https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars](https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars)
---
**Exposure Mod** - [https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
---
**Incompatible with:**
- [Moon Camera](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moon-camera-mortuusars-exposure-mod)  
- [120 Film ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/120-film-mortuusars-exposure-mod-resource-pack)
